LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CHINESE CHAMBER OF COMMERCE'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEYS' FEES AND COSTS. ARGUED AND THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $473,245.03. ATTORNEY BILLING RATES AND HOURS SPENT ARE REASONBALE, RESULTING IN LODESTAR AMOUNT OF $326,521. MULTIPLIER FOR APPELLATE WORK OF 1.5 DUE TO NOVEL AND COMPLEX ISSUES, EXCEPTIONAL RESULTS, THE IMPORTANCE OF THE CASE RESULTING IN A PUBLISHED APPELLATE OPINION, AND THE SKILL AND EXPERIENCE OF CHAMBER'S ATTORNEYS. ALTHOUGH ANTI SLAPP MOTION WAS ONLY GRANTED FOR ONE OUT OF THREE CAUSES OF ACTION, THE SUCCESSFUL AND UNSUCCESSFUL CAUSES OF ACTION OVERLAPPED, THE SUCCESS ON THE MOTION ACHIEVED CHAMBER'S OBJECTIVE AND ADVANCED ITS LITIGATION POSTURE RESULTING IN STRIKING THE ONLY CAUSE OF ACTION AGAINST IT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Defendant Chinese Chamber Of Commerce'S Amended Motion For Attorneys' Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Mar-24-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CHINESE CHAMBER OF COMMERCE'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEYS' FEES AND COSTS.
APPEARANCES: Kyle L. Schriner, Esq. of Holme Roberts & Owen LLP 268-1949 for pltf & opposing party; K. Scott Dickey, Esq. & Steve J. Cikes, Esq. of Renne Sloan Holtzman Sakai LLP 678-3800 for deft & moving party.
RULING: Argued and the Court modified its tentative ruling and adopted as follows: granted in the amount of $473,245.03. Attorney billing rates and hours spent are reasonbale, resulting in Lodestar amount of $326,521. Multiplier for appellate work of 1.5 due to novel and complex issues, exceptional results, the importance of the case resulting in a published appellate opinion, and the skill and experience of Chamber's attorneys. Although anti SLAPP motion was only granted for one out of three causes of action, the sucCessful and unsuccessful causes of action overlapped, the success on the motion achieved Chamber's objective and advanced its litigation posture resulting in striking the only cause of action against it. (302/CWW/ER) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
